techniques.name: Multi-Sample Multi-Source Biometric Authentication
techniques.description: Composite biometric authentication technique that combines multiple biometric features from different sources and samples to improve authentication accuracy and robustness.
sources: @inproceedings{pohMultisampleMultisourceModel2002,  title = {A Multi-Sample Multi-Source Model for Biometric Authentication},  booktitle = {Proceedings of the 12th {{IEEE Workshop}} on {{Neural Networks}} for {{Signal Processing}}},  author = {Poh, N. and Bengio, S. and Korczak, J.},  year = {2002},  month = sep,  pages = {375--384},  doi = {10.1109/NNSP.2002.1030049}}
